summary: Tested all 10 features in the multi-part currency/email/references refactor batch. Backend: 21/23 pass (2 skipped - no subscriptions or valid manual order data to test). Frontend: All currency display tests PASS. One backend correctness issue: legacy email templates NOT pruned from existing tenant DB.

minor.issue: For existing tenant 'automate-accounts', legacy quote_request_admin and quote_request_customer templates are still present in DB (returned in API response and visible in Admin UI). The _TEMPLATES list in email_service.py correctly excludes them (new tenants won't get them), but ensure_seeded() only ADDS missing templates and never REMOVES deprecated ones. Existing tenants need a migration to prune these.

base_currency_amount column NOT present in orders export CSV for existing orders (2 orders predate FX feature). This is expected behavior - the column auto-appears only when new checkout orders are created via the updated checkout flow that stores base_currency_amount. No new checkout orders exist in this environment to verify.

test_results_detail.email_templates_code_definition: PASS - _TEMPLATES list does not define quote_request_admin or quote_request_customer
test_results_detail.email_templates_existing_tenant_db: FAIL - quote_request_admin and quote_request_customer still in DB for 'automate-accounts' tenant (ensure_seeded doesn't remove deprecated templates)
test_results_detail.article_ref_resolution: PASS - {{ref:key}} tokens correctly resolved in GET /api/articles/{id} (TestRefValue120 substituted correctly)
test_results_detail.fx_cache_1h_ttl: PASS - _fx_cache dict and _FX_CACHE_TTL=3600 defined in checkout_service.py, get_fx_rate async function exists, cache key and time.time() check present
test_results_detail.orders_export_csv: PASS (informational) - Returns CSV, but base_currency_amount not in headers for pre-existing orders
test_results_detail.store_currency_field: PASS - All 21 products have currency field
test_results_detail.store_offering_card_cad: PASS - Store card shows CA$1,000 (using product.currency=CAD)
test_results_detail.product_detail_sticky_summary: PASS - Summary total shows CA$1,000, currency note shows 'All prices in CAD'

action_items: Fix ensure_seeded() in email_service.py to DELETE deprecated templates (quote_request_admin, quote_request_customer) that are no longer in _TEMPLATES list for existing tenants. Add a prune step: delete all templates with triggers not in [t['trigger'] for t in _TEMPLATES].

Verify base_currency_amount appears in orders export CSV by creating a new checkout order via the frontend (or ensure the checkout flow stores base_currency_amount which it does in checkout.py lines 356, 538)
critical_code_review_comments: email_service.py ensure_seeded(): only adds missing templates but never removes deprecated ones. For the promise of 'removed legacy quote_request_admin/customer' to hold for ALL tenants (not just new ones), a cleanup pass must be added.

The feature description says 'removed for new tenants' - if that's the intent (legacy tenants keep old templates), then the feature is CORRECT as-is. But if the intent is to remove these globally, ensure_seeded() needs a delete step.

The 'ensure_seeded' function logic should be: (1) seed missing templates, (2) update metadata of existing system templates, (3) DELETE templates with trigger in DEPRECATED_TRIGGERS list. Currently step 3 is missing.

success_rate.backend: 91% (21/23 pass, 2 skipped due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: reference key=TEST_iter120_ref (value=TestRefValue120), article with ref token in category Blog. Both deleted after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All currency display features verified: store cards show correct symbols ($, CA$), product detail page (prod_bookkeeping) shows CA$1,000 with 'All prices in CAD'. Article {{ref:key}} resolution works. FX cache implemented. Permissions modules has no quote_requests. Main issue: existing tenant 'automate-accounts' still has quote_request_admin + quote_request_customer templates in DB (seeded in a prior version). The _TEMPLATES list has removed them but ensure_seeded() doesn't prune. base_currency_amount column only appears in CSV for orders created post-FX-feature (existing 2 orders don't have it).

legacy_email_templates_persist.root_cause: email_service.py ensure_seeded() has three behaviors: (1) if 0 templates exist: seed all, (2) if some exist: add missing ones, (3) always update metadata of system templates. It never DELETES templates that are removed from _TEMPLATES. The existing 'automate-accounts' tenant had quote_request_admin + quote_request_customer seeded in a previous version.
legacy_email_templates_persist.reproduction: GET /api/admin/email-templates returns triggers including ['quote_request_admin', 'quote_request_customer'] for tenant automate-accounts
legacy_email_templates_persist.mitigation: Add to ensure_seeded(): after seeding, delete any template where trigger not in {t['trigger'] for t in _TEMPLATES} AND is_system=True. Or maintain a DEPRECATED_TRIGGERS list.
